title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with Taiki Shuttle...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Take a gander at that machine! It's chock-full of
Umamusume toys!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She points toward a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It says they're called "Cuties"! I'll be darned if
they don't live up to their name, hehe!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Betcha my little sisters would appreciate one of
these. I should send 'em some!
choice_data_list: All right, I'll win some for you!
All right, I'll win some for you!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ya will?! Thanks so much! Now, go on—show me
what ya got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
